code:
import io
import string
import list

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = io.read_line()
  match line
  when Some(s)
    let parts = string.split_whitespace(s)
    mut result: List<Int> = []
    mut prev: Int = 0
    mut has_prev = false
    mut i = 0
    let n = parts.len()
    while i < n
      match parts.get(i)
      when Some(tok)
        match string.parse_int(tok)
        when Some(v)
          if not has_prev
            result = list.push(result, v)
            prev = v
            has_prev = true
          else if v != prev
            result = list.push(result, v)
            prev = v
          end
        when None
          ()
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    mut out = ""
    mut j = 0
    let m = result.len()
    while j < m
      match result.get(j)
      when Some(v)
        if j == 0
          out = "#{v}"
        else
          out = "#{out} #{v}"
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      j = j + 1
    end
    println(out)
  when None
    println("")
  end
end
